caption: A man is seated in a podcast studio, wearing a white button-down shirt, light-colored suspenders, a red bowtie, and a distinctive tall, grey, spiked wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and glasses, speaking into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with framed photographs and a clothing rack with various garments, including a yellow shirt. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BOSS TALK JOY" alongside a microphone icon and the word "PODCAST." As the scene progresses, the man remains in a similar position, continuing to speak while slightly shifting his head and facial expression. The overall setting is an indoor studio environment focused on the man as he engages in a conversation.
